name: American Homes 4 Rent
description: American Homes 4 Rent, doing business as AMH, is a leading real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring, developing, renovating, leasing, and managing high-quality single-family homes as rental properties. Founded in 2012 and headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada, the company has built a vertically integrated business platform to manage its portfolio of tens of thousands of homes across several states, providing premium rental housing options and property management services to residents.
